prohibited_claim: claim summary means claim is true
allowed_wording: A claim summary records the current simulated reviewer status and limits only; claim truth still depends on underlying source review and later professional judgement.

prohibited_claim: claim summary means OBC or FBC evidence is complete
allowed_wording: Stage 16A covers current claim-matrix summaries only; future OBC/FBC drafting-specific claims remain controlled under EG-0045.
Legal and statutory claims still require legal review and later real-world legal advice.

prohibited_claim: claim summary closes WPL readiness gates
allowed_wording: No claim summary closes approval, consultation, OBC, FBC, statutory, procurement or implementation gates.

prohibited_claim: claim summary can be cited instead of the source
allowed_wording: Future drafting must cite underlying source IDs and locations, not the summary alone.

prohibited_claim: claim summary means source is current
allowed_wording: Source currentness must be rechecked before real-world reliance or publication.
